name: Metropolix
description: Multitrack, performance-oriented pitch, gate and mod sequencer. Two tracks with 8 stages, per-stage pulse count, gate type, slide, skip, ratchet, probability and accumulator. Three assignable MOD lanes.

controls.name: Pitch Sliders
controls.description: Set default pitch per stage. Range and root configurable per track.
controls.detail: 1–4 octave range · scale-quantized · overridable per stage

controls.name: Pulse Count
controls.description: 8-position switch sets how many clock pulses each stage holds.
controls.detail: 1–8 pulses · interacts with Gate Type and Ratchet

controls.name: Gate Type
controls.description: 4-position switch: HOLD, MULTIPLE, SINGLE, or REST.
controls.detail: HOLD=tied · MULTIPLE=gate per pulse · SINGLE=one gate · REST=silent

controls.name: CTRL 1 / CTRL 2
controls.description: Assignable performance knobs for real-time modulation of any parameter.
controls.detail: User-assignable destination · takes effect immediately

controls.name: Encoder
controls.description: Push-encoder for navigating and editing on-screen parameters.
controls.detail: Turn to scroll · press to select/confirm

controls.name: RUN
controls.description: Start or stop sequencer playback.
controls.detail: Configurable as Run/Pause or Run/Stop in SETUP

controls.name: LOOPY (∞)
controls.description: Enters Loopy performance mode for live loop manipulation.
controls.detail: 1-finger or 2-finger loopy · Stage Player sub-mode

controls.name: RESET
controls.description: Returns sequence to starting stage. Long-press sets GATE outputs to 0V.
controls.detail: Global or per-track · responds to RESET IN jack

controls.name: SETUP
controls.description: Opens global setup menu: clock source, MIDI, presets, display settings.
controls.detail: Clock = Internal or External

controls.name: BPM
controls.description: Sets internal clock tempo.
controls.detail: Tap-tempo supported · range varies

controls.name: SCALE
controls.description: Assigns quantization scale and root note to pitch sliders.
controls.detail: Many built-in scales + user scales + 14 chord shapes

controls.name: ORDER
controls.description: Sets playback order of stages (forward, reverse, ping-pong, random, etc.).
controls.detail: Multiple order modes · customizable shortcuts

controls.name: LEN
controls.description: Sets number of active stages in the sequence.
controls.detail: 1–8 stages

controls.name: DIV
controls.description: Sets clock division for the track relative to master clock.
controls.detail: Multiple divisions available

controls.name: SWING
controls.description: Adds swing/shuffle timing to the track.

controls.name: SLIDE
controls.description: Sets portamento (slide) time for the track.
controls.detail: Track-level global slide time

controls.name: GATE (Track)
controls.description: Sets global gate percentage length for MULTIPLE/SINGLE gate types.
controls.detail: % of clock pulse · overridable per stage

controls.name: SLIDE (Stage)
controls.description: Enables portamento slide into the selected stage.
controls.detail: Per-stage on/off

controls.name: SKIP
controls.description: Skips the selected stage during playback.
controls.detail: Per-stage on/off

controls.name: PITCH (Stage)
controls.description: Overrides slider pitch with a specific note value for the stage.
controls.detail: Per-stage pitch override · independent of slider

controls.name: GATE (Stage)
controls.description: Overrides track gate length for the selected stage.
controls.detail: Per-stage gate percentage

controls.name: RATCH
controls.description: Adds ratcheting (note repeats) within a stage's pulse count.
controls.detail: Per-stage · interacts with Gate Stretching

controls.name: PROB
controls.description: Sets probability that a stage will play on any given pass.
controls.detail: Per-stage · 0–100%

controls.name: ACCUM
controls.description: Cumulative pitch transposition that grows each time stage is visited.
controls.detail: Per-stage · polarity, range, and order configurable

controls.name: CV
controls.description: Assigns a CV value or gate-toggle voltage to a stage for MOD/AUX output.
controls.detail: CV Type = CV Value or Gate Toggle

controls.name: ALT (LOAD/SAVE/A/B/CLK/MX/LIM/TYPE)
controls.description: Hold ALT then press stage button to access alternate functions.
controls.detail: LOAD/SAVE presets · A/B output assign · CLK div · MX expander · LIM accum · TYPE cv

controls.name: TRK 1 / TRK 2 / MOD
controls.description: Selects which track or MOD lane is currently being edited.
controls.detail: TRK 1 and TRK 2 are pitch/gate tracks · MOD selects mod lanes

controls.name: EXIT
controls.description: Exits current menu and returns to HOME screen.
controls.detail: Cycles through 4 HOME screen views when pressed repeatedly

controls.name: X / Y / Z Attenuverters
controls.description: Scale and invert the three AUX CV inputs before they modulate assigned parameters.
controls.detail: CCW = attenuated/inverted · CW = unity · center = zero

inputs.name: Clock In
inputs.description: External clock input to sync sequencer to outside source

inputs.name: Reset In
inputs.description: Trigger resets sequence to start stage (reconfigurable as RUN in SETUP)

inputs.name: X In
inputs.description: AUX CV input assignable to any sequencer parameter

inputs.name: Y In
inputs.description: AUX CV input, identical in function to X In

inputs.name: Z In
inputs.description: AUX CV input, identical in function to X In

outputs.name: A Out
outputs.description: User-assignable output A: pitch, gate, clock, or mod signal

outputs.name: B Out
outputs.description: User-assignable output B: pitch, gate, clock, or mod signal

outputs.name: Clock Out
outputs.description: Divided clock output from internal or external clock source

outputs.name: Track 1 Pitch
outputs.description: 1V/oct pitch output for Track 1 (swappable with Track 2 via Trk Out Swap)

outputs.name: Track 2 Pitch
outputs.description: 1V/oct pitch output for Track 2 (swappable with Track 1 via Trk Out Swap)

behaviors.name: Two Independent Tracks
behaviors.description: Tracks share the same 8 sliders but interpret them independently. Each has its own order, length, division, swing, slide, and gate settings. Different clock divisions create instant counterpoint.

behaviors.name: MOD Lanes
behaviors.description: Three CV/gate lanes with their own stage values, order, length, and clock div. Assignable to any output or internal parameter. The key to chord progressions and parameter automation.

behaviors.name: Accumulator
behaviors.description: Cumulative pitch offset that grows each pulse, stage, or loop. Direction (up/down/freeze) and polarity assignable to AUX or mod lane. Limit sets ceiling before wrap or stop.

behaviors.name: Loopy Mode
behaviors.description: Two-finger: hold two stages to loop between them instantly. One-finger on Track 2: Stage Player keyboard mode — each press plays that stage's pitch once. Shift loop region while held.

behaviors.name: Ratchet Modes
behaviors.description: MULTIPLE: each ratchet fires its own gate (machine gun). SINGLE: one overall gate with tremolo subdivisions. GATED: ratchets stretch to fill gate time — rate proportional to gate length.

behaviors.name: Gate Types
behaviors.description: HOLD: ties gate through consecutive stages (legato). MULTI: gate per pulse (staccato). SINGLE: one gate regardless of pulse count (sustained). REST: silence, pitch still advances.

behaviors.name: Brownian Order
behaviors.description: 50% chance forward, 25% back, 25% stay. Sequence wanders but trends forward. Combined with scale quantize and accumulator limits, produces melodies that feel improvised.

behaviors.name: Track Output Swap
behaviors.trigger: Trk Out Swp via AUX or mod lane
behaviors.description: Swaps Track 1 and Track 2 pitch/gate outputs instantly. Melody goes to bass voice, bass to melody. Assignable to AUX for a live crossfade surprise.

behaviors.name: Pitch Pre vs Pitch Post
behaviors.description: Pitch Pre: modulates before quantizer — pushes notes to different scale degrees (voice leading). Pitch Post: adds offset after quantizer — transposes all notes in-scale together.

behaviors.name: Preset Chaining
behaviors.description: 64 presets (8 banks x 8) chainable in sequence. Chain Follow auto-advances after N loops. Use for song structures with distinct verse/chorus patterns.

patchIdeas.name: Boards of Canada chord progression
patchIdeas.patch: Mod Lane 1 → Pitch Post (Track 1+2) · clock /8 · length 4 · values: 0, +2, +5, +7 semitones · sequence auto-transposes through diatonic positions every 2 bars · sliders stay fixed, mod lane moves the root
patchIdeas.diagram:
Metropolix:
* MOD 1: DIV /8 · LEN 4 · values 0,+2,+5,+7 → Pitch Post
* TRK 1: running · TRK 2: running

- Metropolix (Track 1 Pitch) p> VCO1 (V/oct)
- Metropolix (Track 2 Pitch) p> VCO2 (V/oct)
- Metropolix (Track 1 Gate) g> ENV1 (Gate)
- Metropolix (Track 2 Gate) g> ENV2 (Gate) // mod lane transposes both tracks in-scale

patchIdeas.name: Chord arpeggio within a single stage
patchIdeas.patch: Stage gate: SINGLE · Ratchets=3 · Stage accumulator: +4 semitones · limit +7 · each ratchet increments pitch: root → major third → fifth · sounds like a hammer-on triad
patchIdeas.diagram:
Metropolix:
* Stage: Gate=SINGLE · RATCH=3 · ACCUM +4st · LIM +7st

- Metropolix (Track 1 Pitch) p> VCO (V/oct)
- Metropolix (Track 1 Gate) g> VCA (CV) // ratchets step pitch root→3rd→5th

patchIdeas.name: Two-voice counterpoint from one sequence
patchIdeas.patch: Track 1: ORDER=FORWARD · DIV=/1 · Track 2: ORDER=REVERSE · DIV=/2 · same sliders play at two rates in opposite directions · instant melodic counterpoint
patchIdeas.diagram:
Metropolix:
* TRK 1: ORDER=FWD · DIV=/1
* TRK 2: ORDER=REV · DIV=/2

- Metropolix (Track 1 Pitch) p> VCO1 (V/oct)
- Metropolix (Track 1 Gate) g> ENV1 (Gate)
- Metropolix (Track 2 Pitch) p> VCO2 (V/oct)
- Metropolix (Track 2 Gate) g> ENV2 (Gate) // same sliders, opposite directions

patchIdeas.name: Generative brownian walk
patchIdeas.patch: ORDER: BROWNIAN · 8 stages · user scale (pentatonic) · accumulator +1 semitone per loop · limit ±7 · direction via slow LFO on AUX X · melody trends forward but wanders and transposes
patchIdeas.diagram:
Metropolix:
* TRK 1: ORDER=BROWNIAN · LEN 8 · pentatonic
* ACCUM: +1st/loop · LIM ±7 · AUX X → Accum Dir

- LFO (Out) >> Metropolix (X In)
- Metropolix (Track 1 Pitch) p> VCO (V/oct)
- Metropolix (Track 1 Gate) g> ENV (Gate) // wanders but trends forward

patchIdeas.name: Live loopy performance
patchIdeas.patch: Track 1: full 8-stage sequence running · Track 2: enter Loopy · press individual stage buttons to play single notes as a live keyboard over Track 1 · instant lead improv over rhythm
patchIdeas.diagram:
Metropolix:
* TRK 1: 8-stage sequence running
* TRK 2: LOOPY Stage Player mode

- Metropolix (Track 1 Pitch) p> Bass VCO (V/oct)
- Metropolix (Track 1 Gate) g> Bass ENV (Gate)
- Metropolix (Track 2 Pitch) p> Lead VCO (V/oct)
- Metropolix (Track 2 Gate) g> Lead ENV (Gate) // Track 2 played live as keyboard

patchIdeas.name: Hemiola (3/4 inside 4/4)
patchIdeas.patch: Track 1: 8 stages straight · Track 2: Stages 1-3 MULTI pulse 2 · Stage 4 REST · repeat pattern · Track 2 creates a 3+rest feel against Track 1's straight time
patchIdeas.diagram:
Metropolix:
* TRK 1: 8 stages straight
* TRK 2: S1-3 MULTI p=2 · S4 REST

- Metropolix (Track 1 Gate) g> Kick (Trig)
- Metropolix (Track 2 Gate) g> Snare (Trig) // 3+rest against 4/4

patchIdeas.name: Stutter-drop fill
patchIdeas.patch: Most stages: Ratchet=1 · Stage 6: Ratchet=4 Gate=MULTI · Stage 7: REST · Stage 8: Ratchet=1 · creates burst → silence → resume pattern that sounds performed
patchIdeas.diagram:
Metropolix:
* TRK 1: S1-5 RATCH=1 · S6 RATCH=4 MULTI · S7 REST · S8 RATCH=1

- Metropolix (Track 1 Pitch) p> VCO (V/oct)
- Metropolix (Track 1 Gate) g> ENV (Gate) // burst → silence → resume

patchIdeas.name: 100-scale harmonic memory
patchIdeas.patch: Store different scales in user slots (each tuned to a key/chord area) · Mod Lane → Scale Select · division /8 · lane cycles through scale slots · sequence auto-reharmonizes every few bars
patchIdeas.diagram:
Metropolix:
* MOD 1: DIV /8 · assigned to Scale Select
* TRK 1: running · user scale slots loaded

- Metropolix (Track 1 Pitch) p> VCO (V/oct)
- Metropolix (Track 1 Gate) g> ENV (Gate) // scale changes every /8 loop

patchIdeas.name: Swing offset between tracks
patchIdeas.patch: Track 1: SWING=0% (straight) · Track 2: SWING=60% (shuffled) · same melody at two different grooves · jazz-style rhythmic independence between voices
patchIdeas.diagram:
Metropolix:
* TRK 1: SWING=0%
* TRK 2: SWING=60%

- Metropolix (Track 1 Pitch) p> VCO1 (V/oct)
- Metropolix (Track 1 Gate) g> ENV1 (Gate)
- Metropolix (Track 2 Pitch) p> VCO2 (V/oct)
- Metropolix (Track 2 Gate) g> ENV2 (Gate) // two grooves, same notes

patchIdeas.name: AUX as hidden panel controls
patchIdeas.patch: Assign AUX X to Accum Dir · AUX Y to Direction · AUX Z to Stage Length · no cables patched · attenuverters act as 3 extra knobs for live tweaking

patchIdeas.name: Divergent dual-voice polymetric counterpoint
patchIdeas.patch: Track A: LEN=7 · Track B: LEN=5 · both forward at same clock div · phrases slip against each other and only re-align every 35 steps · pair with different scales via Scala for harmonic tension · evolving counterpoint from a single pattern
patchIdeas.diagram:
Metropolix:
* TRK 1: LEN=7 · scale minor
* TRK 2: LEN=5 · scale minor pentatonic

- Metropolix (Track 1 Pitch) p> VCO1 (V/oct)
- Metropolix (Track 1 Gate) g> ENV1 (Gate)
- Metropolix (Track 2 Pitch) p> VCO2 (V/oct)
- Metropolix (Track 2 Gate) g> ENV2 (Gate) // 7 vs 5 realigns every 35 steps

patchIdeas.name: MOD lane as filter envelope accent
patchIdeas.patch: Route MOD 1 to a mod output and send it to filter cutoff · program higher values on accent stages for per-step filter opening · enable slew on MOD for smooth sweeps between steps · no AUX input needed, accent pattern lives inside the sequencer
patchIdeas.diagram:
Metropolix:
* MOD 1: stepped values · slew ON → B Out
* TRK 1: pitch/gate to voice

- Metropolix (Track 1 Pitch) p> VCO (V/oct)
- Metropolix (Track 1 Gate) g> ENV (Gate)
- ENV (Out) >> VCA (CV)
- Metropolix (B Out) >> VCF (Cutoff) // MOD 1 paints per-step accents

patchIdeas.name: AUX-gated ratchet noise bursts
patchIdeas.patch: MOD lane assigned as AUX/gate output fires only on ratcheted stages · route to noise VCA for snare-roll or hi-hat bursts that track the ratchet pattern · main voice plays PITCH A / GATE A normally · place ratchets on steps 4, 8, 16 for fills
patchIdeas.diagram:
Metropolix:
* TRK 1: pitch/gate normal · ratchets on S4,S8
* MOD 1: fires on ratcheted steps → A Out

- Metropolix (Track 1 Pitch) p> VCO (V/oct)
- Metropolix (Track 1 Gate) g> ENV1 (Gate)
- Metropolix (A Out) g> Noise VCA ENV (Gate)
- Noise (Out) -> Noise VCA (In) // bursts only on ratchets

patchIdeas.name: Self-modulating microtonal drift
patchIdeas.patch: Sum PITCH A with MOD 2 through a precision adder before the VCO · MOD 2 range set tiny (~50-100mV) and on a different length than Track A · pitches shift microtonally stage by stage, drifting in and out of tune without breaking the melody
patchIdeas.diagram:
Metropolix:
* TRK 1: LEN=8 · pitch melody
* MOD 2: LEN=5 · small range ±100mV → B Out

- Metropolix (Track 1 Pitch) p> Precision Adder (In1)
- Metropolix (B Out) p> Precision Adder (In2)
- Precision Adder (Out) p> VCO (V/oct)
- Metropolix (Track 1 Gate) g> ENV (Gate) // microtonal drift, 8 vs 5

patchIdeas.name: Polyrhythmic kick and bass split
patchIdeas.patch: Track A drives bass voice at DIV /1 LEN 16 · Track B drives kick drum at DIV /1 LEN 6 · kick hits on a 6-step cycle against a 16-step bass line · polyrhythm resolves every 48 steps · GATE B goes straight to kick trigger input
patchIdeas.diagram:
Metropolix:
* TRK 1: DIV /1 · LEN 16 (bass)
* TRK 2: DIV /1 · LEN 6 (kick)

- Metropolix (Track 1 Pitch) p> Bass VCO (V/oct)
- Metropolix (Track 1 Gate) g> Bass ENV (Gate)
- Metropolix (Track 2 Gate) t> Kick (Trig) // 16 vs 6 → resolves at 48

patchIdeas.name: Acid slide with MOD-driven resonance sweep
patchIdeas.patch: Enable per-stage SLIDE on Track A for a 303-style glide pattern · MOD 1 programmed as ramp/random over 16 steps drives filter resonance · MOD 2 provides per-step VCA accents · voice goes through a screaming resonant LPF for acid lead
patchIdeas.diagram:
Metropolix:
* TRK 1: slides on S2,S5,S7 · pitch pattern
* MOD 1: resonance ramp → A Out
* MOD 2: VCA accents → B Out

- Metropolix (Track 1 Pitch) p> VCO (V/oct)
- VCO (Out) -> LPF (In)
- Metropolix (Track 1 Gate) g> ENV (Gate)
- ENV (Out) >> VCA (CV)
- Metropolix (A Out) >> LPF (Res)
- Metropolix (B Out) >> VCA (CV) // acid squelch

patchIdeas.name: Convergent chord stabs on two VCOs
patchIdeas.patch: Track A pitches VCO1 · Track B pitches VCO2 transposed +5 or +7 semitones via scale offset · both VCOs through the same filter/VCA · OR the gate outputs so either track fires the shared envelope · ratchets on stab stages create flams
patchIdeas.diagram:
Metropolix:
* TRK 1: melody · TRK 2: +7st transpose
* ratchets on S3,S7 for flams

- Metropolix (Track 1 Pitch) p> VCO1 (V/oct)
- Metropolix (Track 2 Pitch) p> VCO2 (V/oct)
- Metropolix (Track 1 Gate) g> OR Logic (In1)
- Metropolix (Track 2 Gate) g> OR Logic (In2)
- OR Logic (Out) g> ENV (Gate)
- VCO1 (Out) -> Mixer (In1)
- VCO2 (Out) -> Mixer (In2)
- Mixer (Out) -> VCF (In)
- VCF (Out) -> VCA (In) // stacked stabs

patchIdeas.name: AUX as clocked Turing reset
patchIdeas.patch: MOD lane programmed to fire only on step 1 of the phrase · routed to Turing Machine reset input · Turing's random CV feeds a secondary VCO · randomness locks to the phrase boundary so the texture mutates in time with Track A
patchIdeas.diagram:
Metropolix:
* MOD 1: pulse on S1 only → A Out
* TRK 1: main melody

- Metropolix (Track 1 Pitch) p> VCO1 (V/oct)
- Metropolix (Track 1 Gate) g> ENV1 (Gate)
- Metropolix (A Out) t> Turing Machine (Clock/Reset)
- Turing Machine (CV Out) p> VCO2 (V/oct)
- Metropolix (Track 2 Gate) g> ENV2 (Gate) // phrase-locked randomness

patchIdeas.name: MOD-driven wavefolder timbre evolution
patchIdeas.patch: Track A drives VCO through a wavefolder · MOD 1 programmed as its own melodic sequence (different length than Track A) feeds fold amount · timbre shifts independently from pitch, so identical notes sound different each time they recur
patchIdeas.diagram:
Metropolix:
* TRK 1: LEN=8 · pitch melody
* MOD 1: LEN=5 · fold sequence → A Out

- Metropolix (Track 1 Pitch) p> VCO (V/oct)
- VCO (Out) -> Wavefolder (In)
- Metropolix (A Out) >> Wavefolder (Fold)
- Wavefolder (Out) -> VCA (In)
- Metropolix (Track 1 Gate) g> ENV (Gate)
- ENV (Out) >> VCA (CV) // timbre sequence decoupled from pitch

patchIdeas.name: Buzz-roll fill with pitch dive
patchIdeas.patch: Program the last two stages with max ratchets (x8) and per-stage slide into a descending pitch · MOD 1 shortens envelope decay across those stages · creates an end-of-phrase snare-roll fill that dives pitch-wise before the pattern loops
patchIdeas.diagram:
Metropolix:
* TRK 1: S7-S8 RATCH=8 · slide ON · descending pitch
* MOD 1: decay shortens on S7-S8 → B Out

- Metropolix (Track 1 Pitch) p> Drum (Pitch CV)
- Metropolix (Track 1 Gate) t> Drum (Trig)
- Metropolix (B Out) >> ENV (Decay) // buzz-roll dive fill
